title: LLMScreen: Evaluating GPT-4 for Automated Title-Abstract Screening in Systematic Reviews
reason: Score: Relevance=2 Evidence=2 Method=2 Citation=2 Recency=1. Rigorous comparison to two human screeners on 1240 Cochrane candidates; full prompt provided; recall 0.97 vs 0.94 human. Minor deduction on recency (GPT-4-0613 version tested).

title: ChatGPT as a Literature Screening Assistant: A Comparative Study
reason: Score: Relevance=2 Evidence=2 Method=2 Citation=1 Recency=1. Clear methodology; 823 papers screened; kappa=0.76 with human expert; limited to one domain (cardiology) reducing generalizability.

reason: Score: Relevance=2 Evidence=2 Method=2 Citation=2 Recency=1. Open-source tool integration; reproducibility across 5 runs reported; 4 datasets; both recall and workload metrics reported.
